events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: missing GFCI protection in kitchen/wet/garage locations is a direct NEC 210.8 violation, compounded by 406.4 (replacement receptacles must be upgraded to GFCI) and 406.9 (wet-location cover requirements). Classified as `fail`, high risk, non-compliant/degraded condition, with corrective actions (install GFCI protection, verify downstream coverage, trip-test, weatherproof covers, re-energize and verify).
